operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV-related test scenario categories for sorter-side issues
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide lists AGV-related test or troubleshooting scenarios, including a missing AGV underneath the sorter, AGV tracking error or lost path, object blocking the AGV, AGV losing battery, RMS showing two AGVs on top of each other, and adding or removing an AGV.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Test scenarios / 1. Sorter side missing agv underneath sorter'
Visible list items: '2. Agv tracking error/lost path?', '3. Object blocking agv', '4. Agv losing battery?', '5. Rms showing two agvs on top of each other?', '6. Add agv / remove agv'
Visible note: 'This happened recently at haslet'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Test scenarios for AGV operations include sorter side missing AGV underneath sorter, AGV tracking error or lost path, object blocking AGV, AGV losing battery, RMS showing two AGVs on top of each other, and add/remove AGV. The slide notes that the duplicate AGV display issue recently happened at Haslet.
